action_items.task: Pick up Omeprazole/antacids at the pharmacy
action_items.context: Needed to treat severe heartburn caused by boarding house food.

action_items.task: Call Mr. Hayes at the boarding house to request a medical diet with lighter, un-fried foods for the client
action_items.context: The current heavy meals are causing the client severe acid reflux and interfering with medications.

action_items.task: Contact Oak Creek Community Clinic to set up an intake appointment for primary care and a medical work restriction evaluation
action_items.context: Required to evaluate back issues and determine suitable employment accommodations.

action_items.task: Call the PO if any issues arise with insurance at the pharmacy today
action_items.context: Contingency plan in case the pharmacy has trouble with the active insurance card.

action_items.task: Bring Oak Creek Community Clinic paperwork or appointment card to the next visit
action_items.context: To verify that the medical evaluation process has been initiated.

critical_updates.details: Client is experiencing severe heartburn and acid reflux due to the fried food at the boarding house. Client also reported severe back issues (L4 and L5 discs bone on bone) requiring a work restriction evaluation. A full medication review was conducted.

External job search remains paused until a medical work restriction evaluation is completed. Client continues to perform light indoor chores (sweeping, wiping tables) at the boarding house to remain mildly active.
Client is living at Mr. Hayes's boarding house. The environment is quiet and suitable, but the provided meals are too heavy and are causing the client severe medical distress.

next_episode_context: Client is stably housed at Mr. Hayes's boarding house and performing light indoor chores. His external job search is paused pending a medical work restriction evaluation for severe back pain (L4/L5 discs). He is picking up Omeprazole today to treat severe heartburn caused by the heavy boarding house meals, and the PO is calling Mr. Hayes today to arrange a medical diet. The client must contact Oak Creek Community Clinic by Friday to establish primary care and schedule his work evaluation, and will bring the resulting paperwork to the next appointment in two weeks.
